goal: Open-set verification benchmark mode + N-speaker classifier refactor. (1) SpeakerClassifier refactored from binary user/bot to N-speaker — argmax cosine across N enrolled templates. Backwards-compatible enrol_user/enrol_bot API; new enrol(label,samples) for arbitrary speakers. score_all() returns full similarity dict for downstream turn-taking. (2) benchmark.py adds benchmark_open_set_pairs(pairs_file, wav_dir) — VoxCeleb-O compatible trial format. Reports EER and prints reference scores (ECAPA-TDNN ~0.86%, Resemblyzer ~5-6%, MFCC+GMM ~10-15%) so user can see the gap immediately on running it. (3) benchmark_latency() measures per-call CPU time for classifier and AEC — measured 5.36ms classify and 2.80ms per 64ms-of-audio AEC chunk. (4) README adds 'Scoped vs general benchmark' section explaining open-set vs closed-set.
